name: Sopa De Entulho (Rubble Soup)
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Unsmoked bacon -OR- 4 tsp Olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans for a few hours.
2. Fill a large pan with 4 pints cold water and bring to a boil.
3. Press the cloves into the onion as if they were pins, then add the onions to the pan.
4. Add the beans to the boiling water (avoid using canned beans; it's worth the extra effort).
5. Add the bacon cut into small pieces when the beans are tender.
6. Add the turnip cut into small cubes, carrots sliced thinly, and pumpkin slices cut into large cubes.
7. Discard the onion.
8. Add the potatoes peeled and cut into small cubes, as well as the washed leaves of the turnip broken into medium-sized pieces by hand and the cabbage leaves shredded into large pieces.
9. Let everything cook together until all ingredients are soft.
10. Serve each bowl with a teaspoon of vinegar added to the hot soup.
